architectural_notes: Administration bar must be preserved across all versions — never remove or alter it without explicit user instruction
Profile setup flow must handle pre-existing users gracefully — detect duplicate and inform user or redirect, never silently fail
known_issues: Version 24 regression: administration bar was removed when decision log feature was added
Profile setup does not react when a pre-existing user attempts setup — '!User already exists' error occurs with no feedback to the user

existing_features.title: In the profile setup flow, before attempting to register a new user, check whether the authenticated user already has an existing profile in the backend. If a profile already exists, skip the ProfileSetupModal entirely and proceed directly to the main app experience without showing an error or doing nothing silently.

Ensure that only administrators can create a new profile for an existing user. Regular users must not be able to trigger a profile creation or re-registration if they already have a profile. The AdminPanel's ability to manage/create user profiles must remain unrestricted for admin users.

new_feature_requests.summary: Restore the AdminPanel component and its conditional rendering in MainApp.tsx exactly as it existed in Version 23. The AdminPanel must be visible to admin users in the main app shell alongside the Header, Dashboard, and Footer — it must not have been removed or hidden when the decision log feature was added in Version 24.

Fix profile setup flow: when a pre-existing user tries to set up a profile, the app should detect the existing user and respond appropriately (e.g., skip setup or show a message) instead of silently doing nothing. Only administrators should be able to create new profiles for existing users.

projectName: Restore administration bar removed in Version 24 regression
